name: Paradise Limousines Tampa Bay

fit_notes: Not a fit for Summit. Small (~6 employees) limousine/event transportation operator, not a school-bus contractor. School flag = 0 in source data.

name: Union Transportation
recent_news: Independent Western NY wheelchair/taxi/airport shuttle service operating in Lockport since 1986; Medicaid-approved NEMT. Not a school-bus contractor; the Lockport CSD school transport contractor is Ridge Road Express (separate company).
fit_notes: Not a fit for a school-bus tuck-in. ~5-employee NEMT/wheelchair taxi operator. Could theoretically be an SPED/NEMT bolt-on but scale is too small and service type does not match Summit's contracted yellow-bus model. School flag = 0.

name: Jet Transport Inc
recent_news: jettransport.net redirects to jettransport.com, which describes a commercial freight/logistics/intermodal/warehousing company (Chicago-area 708 area code). No school or student transportation services. Chippewa Falls listing appears to be a small unrelated/freight operation.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Commercial freight/logistics operator, not a school-bus contractor. Exclude from Summit tuck-in pipeline. School flag = 0.
